# Noosa House – Family Villa with Resort-Style Pool

> Noosa House is a private 4-bedroom holiday villa in Noosa Heads, Queensland, Australia. It features a heated lagoon pool, tropical gardens, and accommodates up to 8 guests.

## Property Overview

- **Name:** Noosa House
- **Type:** Vacation Rental / Holiday House
- **Location:** Noosa Heads, Queensland 4567, Australia
- **Coordinates:** -26.3950, 153.0940
- **Capacity:** Up to 8 guests
- **Bedrooms:** 4 (5 beds total)
- **Bathrooms:** 2
- **Website:** https://www.staynoosahouse.com/
- **Booking:** https://www.airbnb.com.au/rooms/49181761

## Key Features

- Private heated lagoon-style swimming pool
- Tropical gardens with sun loungers and timber decking
- Spacious open-plan living and dining areas
- Fully equipped kitchen
- Large balcony overlooking gardens and pool
- Fast Wi-Fi and smart TV
- Free driveway parking
- Family-friendly layout
- Quiet cul-de-sac setting on Noosa Hill

## Location Highlights

- Minutes from Hastings Street shopping and dining
- Close to Noosa Main Beach
- Near Noosa National Park walking tracks
- Easy access to Noosa Junction cafés, restaurants and boutiques
- Approximately 30 minutes from Sunshine Coast Airport

## Booking Information

All bookings are handled securely through Airbnb. Real-time availability, guest reviews, and secure payment are available on the Airbnb listing.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.staynoosahouse.com/contact
- Airbnb: https://www.airbnb.com.au/rooms/49181761

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Is the pool private?**
Yes – the heated lagoon pool is exclusively for your group.

**Is it family friendly?**
Absolutely – ideal for families with kids and adults.

**How far is the beach?**
Noosa Main Beach is just a few minutes' drive.

**Is parking included?**
Yes – free private driveway parking is provided.

**What is check-in / check-out?**
Check-in from 3:00 PM, check-out by 10:00 AM. Details provided after booking.
